entertainment_overview: Norwegian Luna features Broadway-caliber production shows, intimate live music venues, a rock bar, comedy, magic, and nightly pool deck activities. Haven guests get priority access to main theater shows via the concierge. Check the Freestyle Daily newsletter (delivered to your suite the evening before) for exact times and booking requirements.

shows.name: Rocket Man
shows.description: A full production tribute to Elton John featuring his greatest hits — 'Tiny Dancer,' 'Crocodile Rock,' 'Your Song,' 'Bennie and the Jets,' 'Rocket Man,' and more. Elaborate costumes, full band, choreography, and spectacular lighting. One of NCL's signature production shows and perfectly suited as an anniversary evening show.

haven_access.how_to_book: Ask the Haven concierge to arrange priority seating — they hold a reserved section for Haven guests in the main theater
haven_access.when_to_arrange: On embarkation day (April 4) or the morning of April 5 at the latest
haven_access.seating: Haven priority section is typically center-front or designated premium seats
haven_access.tip: Confirm the exact showtime with the concierge — there are usually two performances (early ~7pm and late ~9:30pm). For anniversary dinner on the balcony first, the late show works well.

tips: Dress up slightly for the show — it's a special evening and the theater atmosphere elevates it
Arrive 15 minutes before showtime even with priority seating
Cocktails are available at the theater bar before the show and during intermission
The Haven concierge should be contacted Day 1 to secure Haven seats

shows.name: Lunatique
shows.description: NCL's cirque-style aerial and acrobatic production show — Norwegian Luna's signature show featuring the ship's name. Aerial performers, contortionists, acrobats, dancers, and live music. Visually spectacular and unlike traditional musical theater. Typically performed earlier in the cruise (Days 2-3).

haven_access.how_to_book: Request Haven priority seating through the concierge, same as any main theater show
haven_access.tip: This is one of the shows that tends to sell out — have the concierge secure seats on embarkation day

tips: This show often has a pre-show interaction with performers — arrive early
Center seats have the best view for aerial acts
Typically performed on a sea day or the first/second port day evening

shows.name: HIKO
shows.description: A Japanese-inspired magic and illusion show featuring grand-scale illusions, close-up magic, and theatrical storytelling. Combines traditional Japanese aesthetics with Las Vegas-style magic. A unique and surprising production.

haven_access.tip: Magic shows often invite audience participation — sit closer if you want to be selected

tips: Front rows are great for close-up magic elements
The grand illusions are best appreciated from mid-theater
This show typically runs once or twice during the 7-night cruise — don't miss it

live_music_venues.name: Syd Norman's Pour House
live_music_venues.description: NCL's signature rock and roll bar concept. Named after a fictional rock impresario, the Pour House features live rock tribute bands performing nightly. Multiple themed nights throughout the cruise: Eagles tribute, Fleetwood Mac tribute, classic rock anthems, 70s/80s nights. The most energetic bar on the ship.
notable_nights: Eagles Tribute Night — Hotel California, Take It Easy, Desperado
Fleetwood Mac Tribute Night — Go Your Own Way, The Chain, Dreams
Classic Rock Night — mix of 60s-80s hits
80s Night — expect a full dance floor
tips: Gets crowded after 10pm — arrive early to get a table or bar seat
Standing room only is common during Eagles/Fleetwood Mac nights
Drink prices same as rest of ship — drink packages apply
The band takes requests — tip the bartender and ask nicely
Great for April 10 (last full evening) — go out with a bang
No cover charge — just order a drink and enjoy
live_music_venues.vibe: High-energy, singalong-friendly. Dress casually. Average age skews 40+ which means everyone knows the words.

live_music_venues.name: Haven Lounge
live_music_venues.hours: Opens 11am (per Haven policy). Evening cocktail hours vary.
live_music_venues.description: The Haven's private bar and lounge — accessible exclusively to Haven guests. Staffed by Haven bar team who will learn your preferences by Day 2. Used for pre-dinner cocktails, late-night nightcaps, and quiet relaxation away from the main ship crowd.
features: Quieter and more intimate than main ship bars
Haven butler can serve drinks at the Haven pool deck as well
Concierge desk typically adjacent to the Haven Lounge for easy access
Small plates and snacks often available during cocktail hour
tips: The Haven bar team gets to know regulars — tell them your drink preferences on Day 1
Pre-dinner cocktails here before heading to specialty restaurants is a great routine
Late-night spot if you want quiet after Syd Norman's energy
Drink packages typically include Haven bar — confirm with concierge on Day 1

live_music_venues.name: Atrium Bar / Main Atrium
live_music_venues.description: The heart of the main ship. Live music during the day and early evening — jazz, solo performers, acoustic sets. Great for people-watching and a midday drink. Transitions to DJ or trivia host in the evenings.

live_music_venues.name: Casino Bar
live_music_venues.description: Bar integrated into the casino. Complimentary drinks for active players (ask the dealer/pit boss). Open as long as the casino is running.
live_music_venues.hours: Casino opens once ship is in international waters — typically Day 1 evening. Open late.

casino.name: Casino at Sea — Norwegian Luna
casino.overview: Full Las Vegas-style casino with slots, table games, and poker. The casino is one of the largest entertainment spaces on the ship. Games available most evenings and during sea days. Must be in international waters to open (closes while in port).

signup.program: Casinos at Sea (NCL's own rewards program)
signup.how: Visit the casino desk or players club booth on Day 1 — takes 5 minutes
benefits: Earn Tier Credits toward future cruise discounts and free play
Caesars Rewards points redeemable at Caesars properties worldwide (hotels, casinos)
Free drinks while actively playing (ask the dealer)
Access to casino promotions and tournaments
signup.tip: Sign up for both programs — they are separate and both valuable. The Caesars partnership is especially useful if you visit Caesars properties on land.

games.notes: Holly's game. Tables typically $10-25 minimum. Basic strategy: always split Aces and 8s, never split 10s, double down on 11 vs dealer 2-10, stand on 17+. Don't take insurance.
basic_strategy_reminders: Double down: on 11 (vs dealer 2-10), on 10 (vs dealer 2-9)
Stand: on hard 12-16 vs dealer 2-6 (let dealer bust)

games.notes: Wide variety — penny to $5+ machines. Good for casual play. Casinos at Sea points accrue from slot play.
American roulette standard (double zero). Better odds on European/single zero if available. Even-money bets (red/black, odd/even) are casual-play friendly.
Texas Hold'em typically available. Check for poker tournaments posted at the casino — buy-ins usually $25-65 with modest prize structures.

games.game: Three Card Poker / Let It Ride
games.notes: Table game variants with lower skill requirements. Fun for casual play. House edge is higher than blackjack but rules are simple.

tournaments.blackjack_tournament: Daily blackjack tournaments — check Freestyle Daily for schedule and buy-in amounts. Typically $20-30 entry.
tournaments.slots_tournament: Slots tournaments sometimes run on sea days — watch the casino bulletin board.
tournaments.tip: Register for tournaments at the casino desk early in the day — they fill up

budget_guidance.approach: Bring $50-75 to the casino per session. Walk away when you hit your loss limit. A winning session is a bonus.
budget_guidance.free_drinks: You'll receive complimentary drinks while actively playing at table games — pace your drinking accordingly
when_to_play: First evening (April 4) — light warm-up session after dinner
Sea days (April 5, 10) — extended sessions when nothing else is scheduled
Port evenings when you return to the ship — relaxed play after a day out

pool_deck_activities.overview: The main pool deck hosts a full daytime and evening activity program. The Haven pool is private and quiet — the main pool deck is where the action is for those who want it.

activities.description: Multiple trivia sessions daily — music trivia, general knowledge, pop culture. Usually hosted by cruise staff in the atrium or poolside. Low-stakes, fun social activity.
activities.tip: Team up with other guests — better with 4-6 people

activities.description: NCL runs game show formats poolside and in the atrium — Family Feud-style, Newlywed Game, Price is Right parody. Audience participation encouraged.
activities.tip: Sign up at the cruise director's desk or at the event if you want to be a contestant

activities.description: Classic cruise pool contest judged by splash and crowd reaction. Usually mid-cruise sea day afternoon.
activities.tip: Great spectator sport even if not participating

activities.description: Daytime live music on the main pool deck — typically a Caribbean/reggae or pop duo. Sets usually 11am–2pm.
activities.tip: Main pool gets crowded fast on sea days — Haven pool is the quiet alternative

activities.description: Movies projected on the giant screen on the pool deck at night. First-run films and classics. Bring a blanket if it cools down at sea.
activities.tip: Check Freestyle Daily — usually a family film early and a more adult film later

freestyle_daily.what_it_is: The Freestyle Daily is NCL's daily newsletter/activity guide. It lists every event, show time, dining hour, activity, and ship announcement for the following day.
freestyle_daily.when_delivered: Delivered to your suite the evening before (by 8-9pm usually)
how_to_use: Review it each evening before bed to plan the next day
Circle shows and activities you want — times fill up
Note any booking requirements (some shows require advance reservations even for Haven guests)
Check casino tournament times and any special events
GF tip: check any special dining events that may need advance notice for dietary restrictions
freestyle_daily.also_available: Digital version available on the NCL app — can view next day's schedule in the evening

daily_schedule_tips: Get the Freestyle Daily the night before — plan your day over a Haven nightcap
Book show reservations the morning of or the day before — Haven concierge can hold Haven seats
Syd Norman's doesn't require reservations — just show up
Sea days fill up fast with activities — prioritize what matters most
Haven concierge knows the entertainment schedule in advance — ask them on Day 1 for the full week overview
Don't over-schedule — this is a vacation, not an itinerary sprint
